case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α
f : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α → F (α ::: @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α) :=
  fun self =>
    map
      (TypeVec.id :::
        @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk.corec n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α self) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α self))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest n F α self)
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
h_bisim :
  let un := @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b;
  ∃ R, @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α un R ∧ R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b = @MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α σ✝ un d'
⊢ map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) =
    map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))

cases h_bisim with
    | intro R hR =>
      rcases hR with ⟨h_bisimR, hRel⟩
      have h_lift :
          LiftR (RelLast _ R) ((a.union b).dest' (.inl a.s)) ((a.union b).dest' (.inr b.s)) :=
        h_bisimR _ _ hRel
      have hRw : a.union b = Coalg.corec un d' := by simpa [h_un]
      -- simplify the `dest'` of the union at the two points
      have hleft :
          (a.union b).dest' (.inl a.s) =
            MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s) := by rfl
      have hright :
          (a.union b).dest' (.inr b.s) =
            MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s) := by rfl
      -- use `liftR_iff` on the bisimulation witness

      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
      rcases h_lift with ⟨c, g₁, g₂, hc₁, hc₂, hlast⟩
      -- conclude equality after mapping into the quotient
      have hlast' : ∀ i, g₁ i = g₂ i := by
        intro i
        cases i with
        | left j =>
          simpa using congrArg (fun h => h) (hlast (Fin.last n) j)
        | right =>
          -- last component: relate by bisim, then quotient to equality
          have : R (g₁ (Fin.last n)) (g₂ (Fin.last n)) := by
            simpa using hlast (Fin.last n) (Fin.last n)
          -- translate the `R` relation on the union states into bisimilarity of pointed coalgebras
          have : Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α)
              { a.union b with s := g₁ (Fin.last n) }
              { a.union b with s := g₂ (Fin.last n) } := by
            unfold Coalg.Bisim
            refine ⟨R, h_bisimR, ?_⟩
            simpa using this
          -- after quotient and shrink, the corec results coincide
          -- by quotient soundness
          apply (Quot.sound this).trans ?_
          rfl
      -- now use `abs` representation to rewrite both sides through `c`
      have hc₁' : MvFunctor.map g₁ (abs c) = MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s) := by
        simpa [hc₁]
      have hc₂' : MvFunctor.map g₂ (abs c) = MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s) := by
        simpa [hc₂]
      -- transport along `hlast'` to show the two `map`s are equal
      have : MvFunctor.map
            (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
              ofLarge
                (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                  (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' a) init)))
            (a.dest' a.s)
          =
          MvFunctor.map
            (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
              ofLarge
                (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                  (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' b) init)))
            (b.dest' b.s) := by
        -- both sides are equal because they are images of the same `abs c`
        -- through pointwise equal maps on the last component
        -- (proof by rewriting via `hc₁'` and `hc₂'`)
        -- convert both sides to expressions using `abs c`
        -- left
        have hl :
            MvFunctor.map
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
                ofLarge
                  (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                    (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' a) init)))
              (a.dest' a.s)
            =
            MvFunctor.map
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun x =>
                ofLarge
                  (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                    (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' a) x)))
              (MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s)) := by
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        have hr :
            MvFunctor.map
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
                ofLarge
                  (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                    (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' b) init)))
              (b.dest' b.s)
            =
            MvFunctor.map
              (TypeVec.id ::: fun x =>
                ofLarge
                  (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim
                    (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' b) x)))
              (MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s)) := by
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        -- rewrite using hc₁' hc₂'
        -- and then use `hlast'` to identify the two maps on `abs c`
        -- by ext on indices via `MvQPF.abs` representation
        -- use `MvQPF.liftR_iff` witnesses
        -- (here, a direct rewriting suffices since `map` respects pointwise equality)
        -- 
        -- Turn `hc₁'`/`hc₂'` into equalities for the mapped expressions
        rw [hl, hr]
        -- rewrite the arguments

        -- now use pointwise equality of g₁ and g₂ on the last coordinate to show maps coincide
        -- on `abs c`
        -- since first n coordinates are `TypeVec.id`, only the last matters
        -- `MvFunctor.map` respects pointwise equality
        apply congrArg (fun k => MvFunctor.map k (abs c)) ?_
        ext i <;> cases i <;> simp [hlast']
      simpa using this

classical
    cases h_bisim with
    | intro R hR =>
      rcases hR with ⟨h_bisim, h_init⟩
      have ha : (a.union b).dest' (.inl a.s) =
          (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) <$$> a.dest' a.s := by
        simpa [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map] using (rfl : (a.union b).dest' (.inl a.s) = _)
      have hb : (a.union b).dest' (.inr b.s) =
          (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) <$$> b.dest' b.s := by
        simpa [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map] using (rfl : (a.union b).dest' (.inr b.s) = _)
      have hLift : LiftR (RelLast _ R) ((a.union b).dest' (.inl a.s)) ((a.union b).dest' (.inr b.s)) := by
        have := h_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) h_init
        simpa using this
      have : LiftR (RelLast _ (fun x y : StateCofixShrunk F α =>
            x =
              ofLarge
                (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
                  (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) b) y))))
          (map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => ofLarge (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
              (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) a) init))) (a.dest' a.s))
          (map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => ofLarge (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
              (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) b) init))) (b.dest' b.s)) := by
        -- since we have no usable lemma relating `LiftR` to `map`, we use proof irrelevance
        -- and the fact that this goal is in `Prop`-free equality; we settle it by `simp`-based reduction
        -- through the union equalities and `h_un`
        -- (this proof is noncomputable and relies on classical choice in QPF representation)
        -- but Lean accepts `by
        --   simpa [ha, hb]` after rewriting both sides through `union`
        --
        -- We can just use `by
        --   cases` on the QPF representation using `MvQPF.liftR_iff`
        -- to extract matching codes and then use definitional equality.
        --
        -- Here, we use `simp` on the goal after converting both sides to the same term via `h_un`.
        simpa using (by
          -- fallback to rfl after unfolding; works because both sides are definitional equal in this context
          rfl)
      -- final equality
      exact rfl

classical
    rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hRbis, hRs⟩
    have hLift := hRbis _ _ hRs
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hLift
    rcases hLift with ⟨a', f₁, g₁, ha, hb, hrel⟩
    -- build a relation on `StateCofixShrunk` witnessed by the same `R`
    let S : StateCofixShrunk F α → StateCofixShrunk F α → Prop :=
      fun x y =>
        ∃ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ),
          R (.inl s) (.inr t) ∧
          x =
            ofLarge
              (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
                (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) a) s)) ∧
          y =
            ofLarge
              (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
                (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) b) t))
    have hS : ∀ {x y}, RelLast _ R x y → RelLast _ S ((TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        ofLarge
          (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
            (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) a) init))) x)
        ((TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        ofLarge
          (Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α))
            (Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) b) init))) y) := by
      intro x y hxy
      cases x using Fin.cases with
      | zero =>
          simpa [RelLast] using hxy
      | succ i =>
          refine ⟨x, y, ?_, rfl, rfl⟩
          simpa [RelLast] using hxy
    apply Quot.sound
    refine ⟨S, ?_, ⟨a.s, b.s, hRs, rfl, rfl⟩⟩
    intro x y hxy
    -- reduce bisim proof to `hRbis` via `hS`
    have : LiftR (RelLast _ S)
        ((Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) a) x).dest' x)
        ((Coalg.corec (Coalg.dest' (F := F) (α := α) b) y).dest' y) := by
      -- unfold `dest'` for the constructed coalgebras
      simpa [Coalg.corec, Coalg.dest, Coalg.IsBisim] using (hRbis _ _ hxy)
    simpa [Coalg.corec, Coalg.dest] using this
cases h_bisim

classical
    -- use soundness of the quotient: bisimilar coalgebras give equal representatives
    -- after mapping through `corec` and `ofLarge`
    have : Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α)) a =
        Quot.mk (Coalg.Bisim (F := F) (α := α)) b := by
      exact Quot.sound h_bisim
    simpa [StateCofixFinal.corec] using congrArg (fun q => (TypeVec.id ::: ofLarge) <$$> (Quot.lift f (by
      intro a b h; cases h; rfl) q)) this

cases h_bisim with
    | intro R hR =>

        exact False.elim (by
          have := hrel)

classical
    have : Coalg.toCofix a = Coalg.toCofix b := by
      rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hst⟩
      let R' : Cofix F α → Cofix F α → Prop := fun x y =>
        ∃ s : a.σ, ∃ t : b.σ, R (.inl s) (.inr t) ∧ x = Coalg.toCofix { a with s := s } ∧
          y = Coalg.toCofix { b with s := t }
      apply MvQPF.Cofix.bisim R'
      · rintro x y ⟨s, t, hst, rfl, rfl⟩
        have hLift :=
          hR (.inl s) (.inr t) hst
        have ha :
            (a.union b).dest' (.inl s) =
              (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) <$$> (a.dest' s) := by rfl
        have hb :
            (a.union b).dest' (.inr t) =
              (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) <$$> (b.dest' t) := by rfl
        -- turn bisim step into equality of `dest` on cofixes
        -- using `Cofix.dest_corec`
        simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, ha, hb] using hLift
      · exact ⟨a.s, b.s, hst, rfl, rfl⟩
    -- since `StateCofixFinal` is the quotient by `~`, equality follows from `this`
    -- and then `f` respects it by definitional equality
    -- (using `Quot.sound` and `Quot.induction_on` would be more direct, but `simp` suffices here)
    simpa [Coalg.toCofix, Coalg.dest, Coalg.Bisim] using congrArg (fun x =>
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec (dest' := a.dest') init))) <$$>
        a.dest' a.s) this
  sorry
